Name: facebook_keyword_search
Description: STUB — Facebook people search. Requires login + the FB DOM is heavily obfuscated. Selectors below are educated guesses; expect to update them before first real run. Test in DevTools first: search a keyword, find the People tab, inspect a profile link card to confirm href pattern.

Commands.Target: const skip=new Set(['home','marketplace','watch','gaming','groups','events','memories','saved','pages','ads']);const links=[...document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="facebook.com/"], a[role="link"][href^="/"]')];const handles=[];links.forEach(a=>{let href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';href=href.replace('https://www.facebook.com',''); const m=href.match(/^\/([A-Za-z0-9.]+)\/?(?:\?|$)/); if(m){const h=m[1].toLowerCase(); if(skip.has(h)) return; if(h==='profile.php'){const id=(href.match(/id=(\d+)/)||[])[1]; if(id) handles.push('profile.php?id='+id); return;} handles.push(h);}});const dedup=[...new Set(handles)];return dedup.join(',');
